gloss: to hold forth as an example
definition:
1. to exhibit side by side : generally, to exhibit, bring forward , in Mid., (Demosthenes Orator) 
2. to represent  as so and so, π. τινὰ οὐκ ὄντα (Polybius Historicus): also in bad sense, like παραδειγματίζω, (Plutarch) 
3. to exhibit and hand over , τί τινι (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
